what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment metadata record that links an attachment identifier to a board item target in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: The file contains only YAML front matter with no body content.
The target is a board URI board://item-aa0df913.
It belongs to the dragnet-development channel.
It has an added timestamp of 2026-06-24T05:12:09.962493+00:00.
standouts: The target uses a board:// URI scheme, suggesting a board item reference rather than a file or URL.
The attachment type is board_items, indicating this record catalogs a board-level item attachment.
conventions: Uses YAML front matter with leading and trailing triple dashes.
Follows the ledger attachment schema with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields.
concerns: No body content or context about what the attached board item represents.
The board:// URI is not resolvable from this file alone.
notes: A minimal ledger attachment record pointing to a board item in the dragnet-development channel.
questions: What content or artifact does board://item-aa0df913 represent?
Is the attachment meant to be human-readable or only machine-indexed?
purpose_vs_actual: The file appears to serve as an attachment index entry, which matches its actual content; however, it carries no descriptive payload beyond the linkage.
intention_signals: It seems intended to register a board item as an attachment within a channel memory ledger so it can be discovered alongside channel discussions.
contribution: Provides a stable, timestamped pointer from a channel attachment to a specific board item, supporting traceability between channel memory and board items.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a YAML-frontmatter channel attachment record of type board_items that links attachment att-cdc1e5da in the dragnet-development channel to board item board://item-aa0df913.
intention_for_embedding: The record was created to catalog a board item as an attachment within the dragnet-development channel memory ledger.
